evidence: ARIA prompt building was re-reading every action-spec JSON file and materials filenames on repeated requests.
MaterialsLibraryView was recalculating collection counts and total size by recursively scanning the filesystem during rendering.
Both changes replace repeated synchronous disk work with in-memory caches while keeping the existing UI and prompt output shape.

tests.cmd: '/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/usr/bin/xcodebuild' -project IBVault.xcodeproj -scheme IBVault -configuration Debug -sdk macosx -derivedDataPath /tmp/IBVault-codex-perf-build-3 CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build

notes: scripts/validate_rpg.py is referenced by AGENTS.md but is not present in this repository, so RPG validation could not be run.
